faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Union typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the extent of treatment required. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants or regular ants?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are larger than typical ants (up to 5/8 inch), usually black or dark brown, and leave behind piles of wood shavings called frass. You may also hear faint rustling sounds inside walls or see winged ants (swarmers) in spring, indicating an established colony.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a carpenter ant problem in Union?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Union locations. Carpenter ant infestations require prompt attention to prevent structural damage, so we prioritize urgent calls and can typically schedule an inspection within 24 hours.

faqs.question: Are your carpenter ant treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed during and after treatment.
